welcome.title: Hi! I'm Hermes Agent.
welcome.subtitle: As a local autonomous assistant, I can run commands, integrate with your smart home, and perform advanced searches. What shall we do today?

approval.title: Action Requires Approval
approval.description: The agent requested permission to execute a tool.
approval.alwaysTitle: Remember permission and never ask again for this command

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDescription: Select the display language for the interface
settings.enableXmlCodeBlocksDescription: Instructs the agent to wrap code in language-specific XML tags (e.g., <python>...</python>) instead of markdown backticks. Recommended to fix missing code block styling.

errors.interfaceError: Something went wrong with the interface.
errors.connectionError: **Connection error**: {{message}}. Make sure the Hermes container is active and accessible on the configured port.
errors.compressSuccess: ✅ Context compressed successfully by the agent.
errors.approvalRequired: ⚠️ The command above requires manual approval to proceed.
errors.approvalDenied: [APPROVAL_DENIED] Command rejected by user. Do not execute the command.
errors.approvalGranted: [APPROVAL_GRANTED] Permission granted by user. You may proceed with command execution.
errors.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported format ({{type}}). Only JPEG, PNG, GIF, and WebP are allowed.
errors.imageTooLarge: Image too large. The limit is {{size}}MB.

systemPrompts.titleInstruction: \n\nBefore answering, please start your reply with a short title for this conversation (3-5 words) wrapped in <TITLE></TITLE> tags on the first line, then a blank line, then your actual response.
